relatedness_reasoning: Both files concern loan applications flowing between Credit and Risk & Compliance systems; inbound provides application data for review, outbound returns override decisions with risk assessment details derived from that application data. Field concepts (application ID, customer ID, credit score, loan details, collateral ratios) clearly correspond.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the outbound message; no source in inbound.
Message creation timestamp; likely system-generated at time of override decision, not sourced from inbound.
Outbound source is 'risk_and_compliance', which is the inbound destination_department; represents the originating system of the override message.
Outbound destination is 'credit', which is the inbound source_department; represents the target system receiving the override decision.
Fixed enum value 'lending_decision_override' describing message classification; not sourced from inbound data.
Direct correspondence: inbound application_id becomes outbound loanApplicationId with camelCase naming convention.
Direct correspondence: inbound customer_id becomes outbound customerId with camelCase naming convention.
The original credit decision (REJECTED) is not present in the inbound schema; it represents a prior decision state not captured in the application data.
The override decision (APPROVED) is a new decision made by Risk & Compliance; not sourced from inbound application data.
The override reason classification (EXCEPTION_APPROVED) is determined by Risk & Compliance policy; not present in inbound data.
Direct correspondence: inbound credit_score becomes outbound creditScore with camelCase naming convention.
Calculated from total_liabilities divided by annual_income to produce a percentage ratio; not directly present in inbound.
Direct correspondence: inbound loan_to_value becomes outbound loanToValueRatio with camelCase naming convention.
Calculated from employment_start_date to derive years of documented income history; not directly present in inbound.
Array of mitigating factors supporting override approval is determined by Risk & Compliance analysis; not present in inbound application data.
Identifier of the Risk & Compliance executive approving the override; not present in inbound data.
Hierarchical approval level (SENIOR_MANAGER) is determined by Risk & Compliance authorization policy; not present in inbound.
Date of formal override approval is determined at time of decision; not present in inbound application data.
Mandatory conditions imposed on the approved loan are determined by Risk & Compliance policy; not present in inbound data.
Direct correspondence: inbound requested_amount becomes outbound loanAmount with camelCase naming convention.
Exact field match: currency code (GBP) copied directly from inbound to outbound.
Direct correspondence: inbound term_months becomes outbound loanTerm with camelCase naming convention.
Inbound loan_type (Mortgage, Personal Loan) maps to outbound productType (MORTGAGE); enum values differ but concept is identical.
Derived from presence of 'AML/KYC Verification' in required_compliance_checks array; indicates whether AML check was performed.
Derived from presence of 'Sanctions Screening' in required_compliance_checks array; indicates whether sanctions check was performed.
Whether a credit policy waiver is required is a Risk & Compliance determination; not present in inbound application data.
Reference identifier for waiver document is generated by Risk & Compliance; not present in inbound data.
